title: carex tenuis var. brevifolia
intro: Carex tenuis var. brevifolia, also known as Tufted Sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex tenuis var. brevifolia include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and is also used in some traditional medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
